children.html: Ak=Ak−1A=(λk−1k−1λk−20λk−1)(λ10λ)=(λkkλk−10λk)\begin{align} A^k &= A^{k-1} A\\ &= \begin{pmatrix} \lambda^{k-1} & k-1 \lambda^{k-2}\\ 0 & \lambda^{k-1} \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} \lambda & 1\\ 0 & \lambda \end{pmatrix} \\ &= \begin{pmatrix} \lambda^k & k \lambda^{k-1}\\ 0 & \lambda^k \end{pmatrix} \end{align}Ak​=Ak−1A=(λk−10​k−1λk−2λk−1​)(λ0​1λ​)=(λk0​kλk−1λk​)​​

children.html: Ak+1=AkA=(λkkλk−10λk)(λ10λ)=(λk+1(k+1)λk0λk+1)\begin{align} A^{k+1} &= A^{k} A\\ &= \begin{pmatrix} \lambda^k & k \lambda^{k-1}\\ 0 & \lambda^k \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} \lambda & 1\\ 0 & \lambda \end{pmatrix} \\ &= \begin{pmatrix} \lambda^{k+1} & (k+1) \lambda^{k}\\ 0 & \lambda^{k+1} \end{pmatrix} \end{align}Ak+1​=AkA=(λk0​kλk−1λk​)(λ0​1λ​)=(λk+10​(k+1)λkλk+1​)​​

eA=∑n=0∞1n!An=I+A+A22!+⋯=(1001)+(λ10λ)+12!(λ22λ0λ2)+⋯\begin{aligned} e^A &= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} A^n\\ &= I + A + \frac{A^2}{2 !} + \cdots \\ &= \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 0\\ 0 & 1 \end{pmatrix} + \begin{pmatrix} \lambda & 1\\ 0 & \lambda \end{pmatrix} + \frac{1}{2!} \begin{pmatrix} \lambda^2 & 2\lambda\\ 0 & \lambda^2 \end{pmatrix} + \cdots\\ \end{aligned}eA​=n=0∑∞​n!1​An=I+A+2!A2​+⋯=(10​01​)+(λ0​1λ​)+2!1​(λ20​2λλ2​)+⋯​

A11=A22=1+λ+λ22!+λ33!+⋯=∑n=0∞xnn!=eλ\begin{align} A_{11} = A_{22} &= 1 + \lambda + \frac{\lambda^2}{2!} + \frac{\lambda^3}{3!} + \cdots\\ &= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{x^n}{n !}\\ &= e^\lambda \end{align}A11​=A22​​=1+λ+2!λ2​+3!λ3​+⋯=n=0∑∞​n!xn​=eλ​​

A12=0+1+2λ2!+3λ23!+⋯=1+λ+λ22!+⋯=∑n=0∞xnn!=eλ\begin{align} A_{12} &= 0 + 1 + \frac{2\lambda}{2!} + \frac{3\lambda^2}{3!} + \cdots\\ &= 1 + \lambda + \frac{\lambda^2}{2!} + \cdots\\ &= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{x^n}{n !}\\ &= e^\lambda \end{align}A12​​=0+1+2!2λ​+3!3λ2​+⋯=1+λ+2!λ2​+⋯=n=0∑∞​n!xn​=eλ​​

eA=I+A+A22!+⋯=(1001)+(3004)+12!(320042)+⋯=(e300e4)\begin{aligned} e^A & =I+A+\frac{A^2}{2 !}+\cdots \\ & =\left(\begin{array}{ll} 1 & 0 \\ 0 & 1 \end{array}\right)+\left(\begin{array}{ll} 3 & 0 \\ 0 & 4 \end{array}\right)+\frac{1}{2 !}\left(\begin{array}{cc} 3^2 & 0 \\ 0 & 4^2 \end{array}\right)+\cdots \\ & =\left(\begin{array}{cc} e^3 & 0 \\ 0 & e^4 \end{array}\right) \end{aligned}eA​=I+A+2!A2​+⋯=(10​01​)+(30​04​)+2!1​(320​042​)+⋯=(e30​0e4​)​

children.value: について、両者が可換ならば

children.html: exp⁡(A+B)=exp⁡(A)exp⁡(B)\exp(A+B) = \exp(A) \exp(B)exp(A+B)=exp(A)exp(B)

children.value: という定理を使う方法。

children.html: N=(0100)N= \begin{pmatrix} 0 & 1\\ 0 & 0 \end{pmatrix}N=(00​10​)
(λ10λ)=λI+N\begin{pmatrix} \lambda & 1\\ 0 & \lambda \end{pmatrix} = \lambda I + N(λ0​1λ​)=λI+N

exp⁡(λ10λ)=exp⁡(λI+N)=exp⁡(λI)exp⁡(N)(∵λIとNは可換)=(eλI)(I+N)(∵N2=O)=(eλeλ0eλ)\begin{align} \exp \begin{pmatrix} \lambda & 1\\ 0 & \lambda \end{pmatrix} &= \exp(\lambda I + N)\\ &= \exp(\lambda I) \exp(N)\quad (\because \lambda IとNは可換)\\ &= (e^\lambda I) (I + N) \quad (\because N^2=O)\\ &= \begin{pmatrix} e^\lambda & e^\lambda\\ 0 & e^\lambda \end{pmatrix} \end{align}exp(λ0​1λ​)​=exp(λI+N)=exp(λI)exp(N)(∵λIとNは可換)=(eλI)(I+N)(∵N2=O)=(eλ0​eλeλ​)​​

children.value: は直交行列であることを示せ。

children.html: AT=−AA^T = -AAT=−A
AT=A−1A^T = A^{-1}AT=A−1
AAA
AT=−AA^T=-AAT=−A

exp⁡(A)T=exp⁡(AT)(∵転置の定理(AB)T=BTATより、(An)T=(AT)n)=exp⁡(−A)(∵Aが交代行列という仮定)=exp⁡(A)−1(∵exp⁡(A)exp⁡(−A)=exp⁡(A−A)=Iよりexp⁡(−A)=exp⁡(A)−1)\begin{align} \exp(A)^T &= \exp(A^T) \quad (\because 転置の定理 (AB)^T = B^T A^T より、 (A^n)^T = (A^T)^n )\\ &= \exp(-A) \quad (\because Aが交代行列という仮定) \\ &= \exp(A)^{-1} \quad (\because \exp(A)\exp(-A) = \exp(A-A) = I より \exp(-A) = \exp(A)^{-1}) \end{align}exp(A)T​=exp(AT)(∵転置の定理(AB)T=BTATより、(An)T=(AT)n)=exp(−A)(∵Aが交代行列という仮定)=exp(A)−1(∵exp(A)exp(−A)=exp(A−A)=Iよりexp(−A)=exp(A)−1)​​
(eA)T=0(e^A)^T = 0(eA)T=0

children.value:
\begin{align}
(e^A)^T
&= \left( \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} A^n \right)^T\\
&= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} \left( A^n \right)^T\\
&= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} \left( -A \right)^n\\
&= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} (-1)^n A^n\\
&= \sum_{n \in \{x \in \mathbb{N}|xは偶数\} } \frac{1}{n !} A^n
- \sum_{n \in \{x \in \mathbb{N}|xは奇数\} } \frac{1}{n !} A^n
\\
\end{align}
children.html: (eA)T=(∑n=0∞1n!An)T=∑n=0∞1n!(An)T=∑n=0∞1n!(−A)n=∑n=0∞1n!(−1)nAn=∑n∈{x∈N∣xは偶数}1n!An−∑n∈{x∈N∣xは奇数}1n!An\begin{align} (e^A)^T &= \left( \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} A^n \right)^T\\ &= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} \left( A^n \right)^T\\ &= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} \left( -A \right)^n\\ &= \sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n !} (-1)^n A^n\\ &= \sum_{n \in \{x \in \mathbb{N}|xは偶数\} } \frac{1}{n !} A^n - \sum_{n \in \{x \in \mathbb{N}|xは奇数\} } \frac{1}{n !} A^n \\ \end{align}(eA)T​=(n=0∑∞​n!1​An)T=n=0∑∞​n!1​(An)T=n=0∑∞​n!1​(−A)n=n=0∑∞​n!1​(−1)nAn=n∈{x∈N∣xは偶数}∑​n!1​An−n∈{x∈N∣xは奇数}∑​n!1​An​​
\boxed{ }​
